legal_or_standards_source: v2.0.0 audit-integrity mapping legal mapping required
scoring_rule: demand is high where post-emission alteration by ADV-1/ADV-2 is within scope
notes: A1 may satisfy only local preservation; A2/A3 improve portable evidence.

legal_or_standards_source: v2.0.0 retention/audit-trail mapping legal mapping required
scoring_rule: demand rises with deletion, rollback or retained-history dispute risk
notes: A2 requires retained checkpoint; A3 requires finality assumption.

legal_or_standards_source: v2.0.0 auditor/verifier mapping legal mapping required
measurement_dependency: proof-size and verification-time slots external measurement required
scoring_rule: demand rises where an external verifier must check artefact inclusion without trusting the custodian
notes: A1 has no portable inclusion proof unless augmented.

direction: higher favours A3 or witnessed A2
formal_source: v2.0.0 non-equivocation theorem and A7/A8 conditions
legal_or_standards_source: v2.0.0 independent-dispute-resolution mapping legal mapping required
scoring_rule: demand rises where different verifiers could be shown inconsistent audit histories
notes: Non-compensable criterion: cost advantages cannot offset an unmet non-equivocation requirement.

direction: higher favours stronger emission instrumentation, not necessarily ledger
legal_or_standards_source: v2.0.0 access-event completeness mapping legal mapping required
scoring_rule: demand rises with the need to evidence every in-scope access, revocation or policy event

direction: higher favours backends with checkpoint/finality and verifier-state semantics
legal_or_standards_source: v2.0.0 access-notification/logging-timeliness mapping legal mapping required
measurement_dependency: freshness and service availability slots external measurement required
scoring_rule: demand rises where stale checkpoints or delayed visibility would defeat audit purpose

direction: higher favours backends satisfying auditable duty-to-mechanism mappings
formal_source: v2.0.0 field mapping; v2.0.0 forward legal matrix
scoring_rule: demand is high where duties require demonstrable access-event traceability and independent artefact consolidation
notes: Legal claim remains interpretive until v2.0.0.

legal_or_standards_source: v2.0.0 governance-accountability mapping legal mapping required
scoring_rule: high where no single organisation is accepted as authoritative logger by all parties
notes: This is an eligibility screen, not merely a score.

legal_or_standards_source: v2.0.0 minimisation/confidentiality mapping legal mapping required
measurement_dependency: metadata field inventory; no v2.0.0 calibration required
scoring_rule: burden rises with replicated visibility of subject tokens, organisational roles, event timing or policy context
notes: Can block A3 until minimisation and retention controls are specified.

normalisation_domain: unit interval after v2.0.0 normalisation external measurement required
measurement_dependency: storage and proof measurement slots external measurement required
scoring_rule: normalise measured storage growth and proof material per emitted event after v2.0.0
notes: No v1 simulation storage values are admissible for calibration.

normalisation_domain: unit interval after v2.0.0 normalisation external measurement required
measurement_dependency: latency and throughput slots external measurement required
scoring_rule: normalise p50/p95/p99 write latency and sustained throughput after returned external run
notes: Pending because v2.0.0 returned no external measurement data.

formal_source: v2.0.0 component-origin register; v2.0.0 hardware/software template
legal_or_standards_source: v2.0.0 accountability mapping legal mapping required
measurement_dependency: external smoke/service logs external measurement required
scoring_rule: burden rises with multiple operators, endorsement/finality management, key custody and upgrade requirements
notes: Requires v2.0.0 pinning before final repository claim.

direction: higher penalises models with unsatisfied A7/A8
measurement_dependency: v2.0.0 live service evidence external measurement required
scoring_rule: burden is high when the deployment cannot demonstrate witness/gossip or quorum/finality assumptions
notes: An unmet assumption blocks the associated property rather than merely lowering the score.

formal_source: v2.0.0 algorithm identifiers and domain separation
legal_or_standards_source: v2.0.0 retention and future auditability mapping legal mapping required
scoring_rule: burden rises with long retention horizons, migration complexity and signature/profile growth
